business.name: Bentley
business.oneLiner: Six botanical signatures, composed for the ones who wear intention. Discover your note.

services.title: Wild Vetiver
services.blurb: Smoky vetiver wrapped in saffron and leather — a grounded, untamed signature.

services.title: Radiant Osmanthus
services.blurb: Apricot-tinged osmanthus over soft musks. Quietly luminous, never loud.

services.title: Vibrant Hibiscus
services.blurb: Bright hibiscus and pink pepper resting on creamy sandalwood.

services.title: Mellow Heliotrope
services.blurb: Almond, vanilla and heliotrope petals — a powdery, hushed warmth.

services.title: Magnetic Amber
services.blurb: Resinous amber, oud and rich woods. The collection's deepest note.

services.title: Crystal Edition
services.blurb: A limited cut of the bottle — etched facets, lavender pour, leather collar.
